import logging

logger = logging.getLogger(__name__)


def process_events(events: list[dict]):
    for event in events:
        logger.info(f"Processing event: {event['id']}")
        result = handle_event(event)
        logger.debug(f"Event {event['id']} result: {result}")


def validate_records(records: list[dict]):
    for record in records:
        logger.info(f"Validating record {record['id']}")
        if not is_valid(record):
            logger.warning(f"Invalid record: {record['id']}")
            continue
        process(record)


def transform_batch(items: list[dict]) -> list[dict]:
    transformed = []
    for item in items:
        logger.debug(f"Transforming item: {item}")
        transformed.append(transform(item))
    return transformed
